message:
feat(workflows): add HandleSessionEnd workflow for agent session persistence

Implement the HandleSessionEnd workflow (wa-nu4.2.2.3) that captures
structured session summaries when coding agents emit session end events:

- workflows.rs: HandleSessionEnd struct implementing the Workflow trait.
  Extracts session_id, token counts, cost, and end_reason from detection
  triggers across Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini agents. Builds an
  AgentSessionRecord and upserts it via the storage layer. Includes
  comprehensive test coverage (478 new lines): record construction from
  various agent formats, missing field handling, cost parsing, and
  idempotent upsert behavior.

- patterns.rs: Wire session-end pattern definitions in the Codex,
  Claude Code, and Gemini built-in packs to trigger the
  "handle_session_end" workflow instead of having no workflow (None).
  Affected patterns: codex token usage summary, claude code session
  cost summary, claude code session ended, gemini session summary.

- main.rs: Register HandleSessionEnd in the watcher's workflow runner
  alongside HandleCompaction and HandleUsageLimits.

This enables automated session tracking without requiring agents to
explicitly report their lifecycle — the watcher detects session
boundaries from terminal output patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
